'''√s-p-f''' ('''kasapaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quicklime|quicklime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quicklime|quicklime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-p-f
|-
! Lemma
| kasapaf
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisapaf || jisapaf || shisapaf || kisapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusapaf || jujusapaf || shushusapaf || kukusapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusapaf || jusapaf || shusapaf || kusapaf
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusapaf || jusapaf || shusapaf || kusapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesapaf || jesapaf || shesapaf || kesapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosapaf || jojosapaf || shoshosapaf || kokosapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosapaf || josapaf || shosapaf || kosapaf
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosapaf || josapaf || shosapaf || kosapaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf || sapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsapaf || jæsapaf || shæsapaf || kæsapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasapaf || jajasapaf || shashasapaf || kakasapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasapaf || jasapaf || shasapaf || kasapaf
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasapaf || jasapaf || shasapaf || kasapaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasapaf
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasapafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasapafnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasapafnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasapafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasapafnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasapafshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasapafro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasapafnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasapafro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasapafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasapafnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasapafmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasapafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasapafnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasapafsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasapafng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasapafnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasapafng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasapafya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasapafnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasapafya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasapafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasapafnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasapafyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasapafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasapafnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasapafnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasapafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasapafnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasapafnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasapafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasapafnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasapafnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasapafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasapafnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasapafshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasapafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasapafnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasapafshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasapafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasapafnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasapafshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasapafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasapafnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasapafronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasapafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasapafnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasapafroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasapafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasapafnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasapafromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasapafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasapafnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasapafmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasapafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasapafnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasapafmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasapafmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasapafnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasapafmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
